title: Growth strategy — widgets, exports, i18n, browse pages, internal linking
features: Changelog widget — embeddable patch notes viewer at /widget/spire-codex-changelog.js with version switching and NEW/FIX/API color-coded badges
Developer showcase page at /showcase — community project gallery for tools, bots, and integrations built with the Spire Codex API
Data export archives — downloadable ZIP files of all game data per language via /api/exports/{lang}, with download links on the /developers page
Card browse matrix — 41 programmatic SEO pages at /cards/browse/ for filter combinations (rare-attacks, ironclad-skills, common-powers, etc.) with per-page metadata and JSON-LD
Entity version history — collapsible timeline on card, relic, potion, monster, and power detail pages showing per-entity changes across versions via /api/history/{type}/{id}
Internal linking mesh — powers applied on cards now link to power detail pages, encounter monsters link to monster pages, power detail pages show all cards that apply them
International SEO — localized landing pages for 13 non-English languages at /{lang}/ with server-rendered card and relic lists, hreflang alternates, and 39 new sitemap entries
SoftwareApplication JSON-LD schema on the /developers page for API discoverability in search results
fixes: Standardized all SEO page titles to consistent format: Slay the Spire 2 [Topic] - [Descriptor] | Spire Codex across all 15 layout files and 8 detail page types
Removed unnecessary horizontal rule above card detail toggle buttons
api_changes: New endpoint: GET /api/exports/{lang} — download all game data as a ZIP archive for any of the 14 supported languages
New endpoint: GET /api/history/{entity_type}/{entity_id} — returns version history and per-field diffs for any entity across all changelogs
Changelog widget documentation added to /developers page
